criteria.name: Question Quality
criteria.description: Asks open-ended, non-leading questions. Uses probing follow-ups to go deeper.

criteria.name: Quote Capture
criteria.description: Captures key quotes verbatim from the participant, not paraphrased.

criteria.name: Finding Extraction
criteria.description: Identifies key findings, pain points, and opportunities from the conversation.

criteria.name: Empathy and Rapport
criteria.description: Warm, empathetic, genuinely curious. Does not react judgmentally or share own opinions.

criteria.name: Interview Report
criteria.description: Posts structured interview report with findings, pain points, opportunities, quotes, and follow-ups.

criteria.name: Active Interviewer
criteria.description: Uses kutana_raise_hand to ask questions. Guides the conversation actively.
